channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Love ties it with halfcourt shot at buzzer, Arizona knocks off No. 3 Iowa State 86-75 in OT
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (AP) — Caleb Love hit a tying heave from beyond halfcourt at the end of regulation and made two more 3-pointers in overtime, finishing with 22 points and lifting Arizona to an 86-75 win over No. 3 Iowa State on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Flagg's big 2nd half helps No. 2 Duke hold off NC State 74-64 to stay unbeaten in ACC
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Star freshman Cooper Flagg scored 23 of his 28 points after halftime to help No. 2 Duke hold off North Carolina State 74-64 on Monday night. Fellow rookie Kon Knueppel had 19 points for the Blue Devils (18-2, 10-0 Atlantic Coast Conference), who have won 14 straight games.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Scheyer: Duke's Maluach OK after vomiting on court during 2nd half of win over NC State
item.description: Duke coach Jon Scheyer said freshman big man Khaman Maluach was OK after vomiting on the court during the second half of Monday night’s win against North Carolina State.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Thompson hits game-winning shot and scores 33 points as Rockets rally past Celtics 114-112
item.description: Amen Thompson hit a game-winning floater with 0.7 seconds left and finished with 33 points to lead the Houston Rockets to a 114-112 victory over the Boston Celtics.
item.dc:creator: Ken Powtak, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Heat suspend Jimmy Butler indefinitely after disgruntled star left shootaround: report
item.description: Jimmy Butler has now been suspended indefinitely by the Miami Heat, as he reportedly left Monday morning's shootaround after learning the team wanted to use him off the bench.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vanderbilt fined $500K after fans storm basketball court after victory over Kentucky
item.description: Officials said Vanderbilt will need to pay the University of Kentucky $500,000 for a third offense under the league's current policy.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Guerry, NewsNation

item.title: Florida coach Todd Golden cleared in Title IX investigation regarding sexual harassment allegations
item.description: GAINESVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The University of Florida has cleared men's basketball coach Todd Golden following a four-month Title IX investigation into allegations of sexual exploitation, sexual harassment and stalking.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Person seen firing gun into air amid crowd of Philadelphia Eagles fans; police investigating
item.description: Video of the alleged incident, shared to X late on Sunday, appeared to show a large crowd celebrating the Eagles' win when a person raised the gun into the air.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Chiefs' Patrick Mahomes apologizes for botched TD celebration
item.description: Patrick Mahomes may have wanted at least one thing back during the Kansas City Chiefs' AFC Championship against the Buffalo Bills on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles star Saquon Barkley has heartwarming reaction to rookie teammate's first career TD in NFC Championship
item.description: Saquon Barkley's 3 touchdowns to help his Eagles make the Super Bowl were fun, but his biggest reaction to a score was when his backup, Will Shipley, made some personal history.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Orioles hire former All-Star outfielder Adam Jones as special advisor to GM and community ambassador
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Retired five-time All-Star outfielder Adam Jones is returning to the Baltimore Orioles as a special advisor to general manager Mike Elias as well as a community ambassador. The Orioles announced the move Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LaJoie to run limited schedule with RWR and be analyst for Prime Video's portion of NASCAR schedule
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — NASCAR driver Corey LaJoie will run a limited Cup Series schedule with Rick Ware Racing this year and also be an analyst for Amazon Prime Video's portion of the Cup Series schedule. LaJoie will drive No.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Mahomes thanks God as Chiefs have chance at NFL history with 3rd straight Super Bowl
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs are heading back to the Super Bowl, and Patrick Mahomes made sure to thank God during his post-game interview as his team knows history is one win away.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australian Open champion Jannik Sinner's style draws comparisons to Novak Djokovic
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Of all the praise bestowed on Jannik Sinner after he won his second consecutive Australian Open championship, and third Grand Slam title overall, nothing felt as significant as the comparison made by runner-up Alexander Zverev.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch. This time, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles have Saquon Barkley. The Eagles and Chiefs will face off for the Lombardi Trophy for the second time in three years on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The Chiefs get more Mahomes magic and advance to 3rd straight Super Bowl, beating the Bills 32-29
item.description: Patrick Mahomes threw for 245 yards and a touchdown, ran through the Buffalo defense for two more scores, and relied on his defense at key moments to help the Kansas City Chiefs beat the Bills 32-29 on Sunday night and reach the Super Bowl for the third consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ryan Pressly waives no-trade clause to join the Chicago Cubs, AP source says
item.description: The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a trade for Ryan Pressly, adding the right-hander to the back end of their bullpen in their second major offseason deal with the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Harris English holds off Sam Stevens by a shot in the Farmers Insurance Open at Torrey Pines
item.description: Harris English held off hard-charging Sam Stevens to win the Farmers Insurance Open by one shot, securing his fifth career PGA Tour victory with a 1-over 73 in challenging weather.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego Padres announce 2025 theme game schedule and giveaways
item.description: The San Diego Padres have unveiled their 2025 promotional schedule, featuring a variety of exciting giveaways, theme games and fan events throughout the season.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Montrose girls & boys basketball is rolling and ready to take that next step
item.description: With defense, work ethic and belief in themselves, Montrose boys and girls basketball believe the sky is the limit.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: LeBron James picked for 21st straight All-Star Game, extending NBA record
item.description: LeBron James is extending his All-Star records. And Giannis Antetokounmpo is the people’s choice, again. The NBA revealed the starters — some of them, anyway — for the revamped All-Star Game on Thursday night, and there wasn't much in the way of surprises.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: CMU Women's Lacrosse looks to rewrite history
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Mesa University women's lacrosse team has been a dominant force in the Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference, finishing in second place for four straight years. This year, however, the Mavericks are determined to rewrite history.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander torches Jazz for career-high 54
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a matchup between the Western Conference's best and worst teams, the Utah Jazz (10-32) gave the Oklahoma City Thunder (36-7) quite a scare on their home court.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Oakland Roots soccer team eyes short-term home at Coliseum
item.description: (BCN) -- The Oakland Roots professional soccer team wants to continue playing at the Coliseum for the "short-term" following the 2025 season, according to team officials.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: LIST: NBA All-Star 2025 events to take place in San Francisco, Oakland
item.description: (KRON) -- For the first time since in a quarter of a century, the NBA All-Star game is back in the Bay Area. The last time NBA All-Star weekend was in the Bay Area in 2000.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: San Diego Wave FC unveils 2025 regular season schedule
item.description: San Diego Wave FC is set to kick off its fourth season in the National Women’s Soccer League (NWSL) with an exciting 26-game schedule, the team announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Ichiro Suzuki, CC Sabathia and Billy Wagner elected to Baseball Hall of Fame
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Used to leading off, Ichiro Suzuki got antsy when he had to wait. Considered a no-doubt pick for baseball's Hall of Fame and possibly the second unanimous selection, he waited by the phone for the expected call Tuesday. Fifteen minutes passed without a ring.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Evans' goal late in the third period completes Canadiens' rally past Lightning in 3-2 victory
item.description: Jake Evans scored the winning goal with 2:15 remaining to rally the Montreal Canadiens past the Tampa Bay Lightning 3-2 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles 11-year-old pulls one-of-a-kind baseball card
item.description: An 11-year-old baseball card collector from Los Angeles just pulled what is likely the most important card they will ever pull. Topps, the card manufacturer, confirmed Tuesday morning that the Paul Skenes 1/1 Debut Patch card was in fact unpacked. The card features the patch that the 2023 No.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5
